  "RX.3": "The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.",

rationale.R1.3: The agent output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying a critical contradiction in the reported results.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations and suggests adding more references, demonstrating thorough auditing but not fully addressing all gaps.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, fulfilling the highest standard.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack traceability.
